name: Profile_R5_GenomicStudy_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.GenomicStudy resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 GenomicStudy resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.GenomicStudy resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 GenomicStudy resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: The type of the study (e.g., Familial variant segregation, Functional variation detection, or Gene expression profiling) (new)
element.comment:
Element `GenomicStudy.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `GenomicStudy` is not mapped.
Element `GenomicStudy.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
